# Aikami Knowledge Index

> **AI-first entry point.** Read this file first.
> Generated: 2026-06-06
> Files: 87 across 10 categories

1. [AI Briefing](CONTEXT.md) — what we're building, tech stack, active contracts
2. [Contracts Index](contracts/INDEX.md) — active feature contracts

4. [Tech Stack](guides/STACK.md) — technology stack
5. [Coding Standards](guides/CODING_STANDARDS.md) — project conventions

## Main Repo

Monorepo: SvelteKit PWA × Firebase backend × Bun runtime × Moon orchestrator.

---

## How to Use

**For AI tools:**
1. Read this entire file first — it's the map
2. Identify 2-5 files relevant to your task
3. Read those files before writing anything

**For humans:** Browse on GitHub — all markdown renders natively.

**Adding files:** Create markdown in the right category folder.
Run `bun run scripts -- generate_llms` to update this index.
